name: Supply Chain Fraud Detection
description: Unified Apache Beam pipeline supporting both batch (GCS) and streaming (Pub/Sub) modes. Ingests WMS + ERP events and writes bronze/silver/gold tables to BigQuery with velocity + anomaly fraud detection.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.label: Pipeline mode
parameters.helpText: Pipeline execution mode: 'batch' (reads from GCS) or 'streaming' (reads from Pub/Sub). Required.

parameters.name: wms_input
parameters.label: [BATCH] WMS input JSONL path
parameters.helpText: GCS path to the WMS receiving events file. Example: gs://my-bucket/wms_receiving.jsonl. Required for batch mode.

parameters.name: erp_input
parameters.label: [BATCH] ERP input JSONL path
parameters.helpText: GCS path to the ERP invoices file. Example: gs://my-bucket/erp_invoices.jsonl. Required for batch mode.

parameters.name: wms_subscription
parameters.label: [STREAMING] WMS Pub/Sub subscription
parameters.helpText: Full subscription path for WMS events. Example: projects/PROJECT/subscriptions/wms-events-sub. Required for streaming mode.

parameters.name: erp_subscription
parameters.label: [STREAMING] ERP Pub/Sub subscription
parameters.helpText: Full subscription path for ERP events. Example: projects/PROJECT/subscriptions/erp-events-sub. Required for streaming mode.

parameters.name: bq_dataset
parameters.label: BigQuery dataset (project:dataset)
parameters.helpText: Fully qualified target dataset. Example: fraud-detect-260526-1750:fraud_detection. Required for both modes.

parameters.name: dedup_ttl_seconds
parameters.label: Dedup TTL (seconds)
parameters.helpText: How long the stateful dedup DoFn remembers seen invoice_ids. Default 3600.

parameters.name: velocity_window_seconds
parameters.label: Velocity window (seconds)
parameters.helpText: Sliding window size for the velocity rule. Default 600 (10 min).

parameters.name: anomaly_stddev_threshold
parameters.label: Anomaly z-score threshold
parameters.helpText: Standard deviations above the vendor baseline to fire ANOMALY alert. Default 3.0.
